incentive.statement: Completed typed-authority migrations must close with truthful lifecycle records, a bounded live target, preserved historical evidence, and one complete exact-input readiness proof.

coordinator.responsibility: Reconcile lifecycle and historical coordination debt, then run the indivisible repository readiness handoff without changing the completed grammar incentives.

outcome: Finished actions are truthfully closed, historical targets are preserved outside the live target, alignment is exact, and the integrated worktree passes the resumable readiness gate through browser delivery.

responsibilities.statement: Reconcile completed action status and closure witnesses, preserve the historical target, and maintain the bounded current target and board handoff record.

actors.contribution: Close only finished actions, retain their original responsibility assignments, and move accumulated historical detail out of the live target.

responsibilities.statement: Verify the combined canonical ESM runtime, typed grammar and application paths, UI and URL consumers, audits, lexical evidence, and browser delivery without modifying their completed ownership boundaries.

actors.contribution: Run alignment and the content-addressed readiness gate, diagnose any current-input failure, and repair only attributable stale consumers or integration defects.

retirements.removalEvidence: Eight actions whose original actors, responsibilities, and retirements were already complete now carry complete lifecycle status and explicit old-authority-removal witnesses.
The full 2026-07-17 through 2026-07-19 target history is preserved in a dedicated history document while CURRENT_TARGET.md contains only the active handoff.
